name: inkforge
description: InkForge — a 7-agent human-voice writing studio. Drafts any format (fiction, scripts, essays, long-form, marketing, academic-style) in a bespoke author voice with a different personality per assignment, then runs a de-AI pass against an 8-point tell list and a real textstats check so the prose reads genuinely human — not like AI. Bilingual RO/EN. Honest by design: writes your own/original work, and never academic fraud or 'undetectable' claims.
